{{Quote|You were the ''best'' first mate I ever had…|Finhead Stonebone, to Roko, before the latter's death|<ref name="nomi2" />}}
'''Roko''' was the [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Finhead Stonebone]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Based in the [[Stenness Node]], [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|Stonebone's pirate gang]] plagued [[Ithullan ore hauler|Ithullian ore haulers]] traveling through the region, attacking them and siphoning the valuable [[mutonium]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] they carried. In [[3999 BBY]], Roko and their team ambushed one particular [[Gruna's ore hauler|ore hauler]] that was under the control of Captain [[Gruna]]. Although the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was protected by [[Bogga's enforcer gang|minions]] of local [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], the ship's defenses were neutralized, and Roko and a team of pirates moved in to pillage the ship and siphon its ore. However, they were surprised by the sudden arrival of Bogga's massive [[Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaught|dreadnought]], [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']], which caught the pirate ship ''[[Marauder Starjacker]]'' in its [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], capturing Roko, Stonebone, and the other pirates. They were brought to [[Bogga's palace|Bogga's estate]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Vo Dasha]], where Bogga offered Stonebone and the pirates freedom if he performed a task for the crime lord. When Stonebone refused, Bogga unleashed his pet [[hssiss]] [[Ktriss]] on Roko, and the beast quickly [[Death/Legends|ripped them to shreds]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|That's it, cap'n! We're all ''rich''!|Roko|<ref name="nomi2" />}}
[[File:FinheadStonebone.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Roko was a member of Finhead Stonebone's (pictured) pirate crew.]]
Roko was a member of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Finhead Stonebone]]'s [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|gang]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Roko was well-liked by Stonebone and eventually became the pirate leader's [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]]. Stonebone's pirate group was based in the [[Stenness Node]] region, and one of their primary activities was siphoning [[Ore/Legends|ore]] from the [[Ithullan ore hauler|Ithullian ore haulers]] that [[Transport/Legends|transported]] their cargo through the region to the [[Stenness Hyperspace Terminal]].<ref name="nomi2" /> In [[3999 BBY]],<ref name="SWI28 date" /> the gang set their sights on one particular [[Gruna's ore hauler|ore hauler]], captained by [[Gruna]], which was shipping valuable [[mutonium]] ore. In their [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Marauder Starjacker]]'', Roko and the pirates dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and began attacking the ship.<ref name="nomi2" />

Although the ore hauler was defended by an [[Dreebo|underling]] of the local [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], pirate [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] [[C'borp]] was able to clear the way for Roko and a boarding party to enter the ore hauler and start siphoning. The pirates pierced the ship's [[Hull/Legends|hull]], and Roko, along with a number of other pirates, descended down into the disabled ore hauler. Roko and the pirates were quite satisfied with their haul, and Roko personally took a [[Roko's prisoner|member]] of the ship's crew [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]. Their jubilance was short-lived, however, as Bogga the Hutt's [[Warship/Legends|warship]] [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']] promptly arrived on the scene. The ''Enforcer One'' ensnared the ''Marauder Starjacker'' in a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], capturing the pirate gang. The pirate vessel was pulled into the mighty [[Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaught|dreadnought's]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], where Roko and their fellow crewmembers found themselves encircled by an ensemble of [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] and [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcers]], led by one of Bogga's top [[Gender/Legends|men]], [[Grimorg]].<ref name="nomi2" /> 

[[File:KtrissAttacks.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Roko is attacked by Ktriss on Vo Dasha.]]
The pirate gang was ordered off their ship and transported to Bogga's [[Bogga's palace|private estate]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Vo Dasha]]. Stonebone was personally brought before Bogga, who offered him a deal: he and his pirate associates would be freed if they retrieved a lost shipment of valuable [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] from Bogga's sworn enemy, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thon]]. When Stonebone refused, a chained Roko was brought out in the estate's courtyard, and Bogga unleashed his pet [[hssiss]] [[Ktriss]] on a frightened Roko. Although Roko pleaded with Stonebone for help, the pirate captain was powerless to assist his first mate, instead telling Roko that they had been the best first mate Stonebone ever had. Ktriss then swiftly ripped Roko to shreds.<ref name="nomi2" /> Roko's gruesome [[Death/Legends|death]] convinced Stonebone to help Bogga in retrieving the [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]].<ref name="nomi3">[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Cap'n Finhead–''what's happening?'' Don't let 'em hurt me!|Roko, shortly before dying|<ref name="nomi2" />}}
Roko had [[Color|tan]] skin. They had a strong relationship with Finhead Stonebone, to the point that Stonebone referred to Roko as the best first mate he ever had before Roko died. Roko was good friends with the pirate captain, and referred to Stonebone respectfully by his title. Roko performed duties as a pirate with enthusiasm and aplomb, and greatly enjoyed the task of storming the ore hauler in the Stenness Node. However, Roko quickly became fearful when presented with the clear and present danger posed by the angry Ktriss and desperately pleaded to Stonebone for help.<ref name="nomi2" />

==Equipment==
Roko wore a yellow [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]] and [[Clothing/Legends|pants]] with tan shoulderpads, a white [[shirt]], brown shoes, a [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]], a gray armband, and a brown [[Belt/Legends|belt]] with [[Hair/Legends|fur]] draped on it.<ref name="nomi2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Roko first appeared in the [[Tales of the Jedi 4|fourth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated by [[David Roach]],<ref name="nomi2" /> and released on [[January 18]], [[1994]].<ref name="DarkHorse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-141/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi-4-of-5|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi 4}}</ref>
